report: Phase 16.12G — Deploy Verification + Crawled-Not-Indexed Guide Fix
summary: Verified GitHub → Vercel auto-deploy is working perfectly (no deploy hook needed). Confirmed sitemap fix from 16.12F is live. Fixed Social Security guide: cleaned keyword-stuffed meta title + added Article schema. Both fixes affect all 125 guides site-wide.

TASK_1_vercel_deploy.finding: GitHub auto-deploy IS configured and working
TASK_1_vercel_deploy.verification: Vercel API v6 confirmed deployment matching latest commit SHA

fixes: Meta title: 'Social Security Calculator Guide 2026 — Calculate in 30 Seconds...' → 'Social Security — Step-by-Step Guide 2026 (Free Calculator)'
Schema: Added Article type (alongside existing WebApplication)
TASK_3_guide_fix.validate_fix: HOLD — wait 7+ days for Google recrawl

crawled_not_indexed.action: HOLD — 3 sitemap FIXED, 1 guide IMPROVED, 1 favicon

src/app/guides/[slug]/page.tsx — Add Article structured data (commit fda6ba7)
key_discovery: GitHub → Vercel auto-deploy works perfectly. Push to main = automatic deploy in ~100 seconds. No deploy hook needed — previous deploy failures were from missing hook config, not broken integration.
